name: The Hot Springs Endeavors - Faramor AFK Journey
description:
Art by zhengshizi on Twitter.

Tale 1

To Faramor, duty is more than an obligation—it is a promise, one he keeps with quiet pride, no matter how heavy the burden.

Tale 2

Faramor may be a hunter of the undead, but he doesn’t fight out of hatred. He fights to protect what little warmth remains in this world.

Tale 3

Despite his gruff exterior, Faramor has a soft spot for small joys—a warm meal after patrol, the crunch of fresh snow underfoot, the laughter of children in the streets.

Tale 4

His coat is thick, his frame sturdy, and his fur well-kept—though he’d never admit to the extra time he spends making sure it stays that way.

Tale 5

The cold has been his companion for as long as he can remember, but even Faramor isn’t immune to the simple pleasure of thawing out beside a crackling hearth.

Tale 6 (Affinity 300)

Faramor takes good care of his weapons, but he treasures his old leather-bound journal just as much. It holds notes on patrols, sketched maps, and the occasional doodle when no one is looking.

Tale 7 (Affinity 500)

Though he rarely indulges, Faramor can’t resist a visit to the hot springs. He claims it’s for recovery, but deep down, he just enjoys feeling weightless for a while.

Tale 8 (Affinity 1000)

Once, a young villager gifted Faramor a knitted scarf after a particularly harsh winter. You can find it tied around the Oathheart if you look closely enough.

Tale 9 (Affinity 1700)

Cedartown has always felt like home, even if Faramor tells himself he doesn’t belong. No matter where his duty takes him, he always finds his way back.

Tale 10 (Affinity 2200)

Faramor doesn’t think of himself as a hero, just a man doing his job. But when he sees the people he’s protected smiling, he wonders if maybe—just maybe—that’s enough.
